name: Herman Peach Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 1 large can (29 oz) peach slices, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix Herman Starter, oil, eggs, milk, and vanilla in a bowl.
2. Gradually add all dry ingredients to the mixture and stir until well combined. The batter should be thick.
3. Drain the peaches and transfer them to a greased 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
4. Pour the batter over the peach slices.
5. Bake at 325°F for 30 to 40 minutes.
6. Serve warm with half-and-half or cream.
